title: Blood Ore Mod
description: This mod adds tools and armor to Minecraft that are better than netherite. Find Blood Ore to combine with netherite gold and diamond to create Blood Gems to craft armor and tools.
body:
Blood Ore Mod

Version: 1.0.0
Minecraft Version: 1.21
Requires Forge

Overview

Descend into the depths and uncover Blood Ore, a powerful new resource infused with dark energy. Mine the ore to collect Blood Dust, refine it into Blood Gems, and craft the ultimate Blood gear — tools, weapons, and armor that outclass even Netherite.

Features

Blood Ore: Found deep underground in the Overworld. Drops Blood Dust when mined.

Blood Dust & Blood Gem:

Blood Gems are the key ingredient for all Blood gear.

Blood Weapons & Tools:

Higher damage and durability than Netherite.

Slightly faster mining speed.

Blood Armor

Showcase
